title: callicarpa wrightii
intro: Callicarpa wrightii, also known as the purple coral honeysuckle, is a flowering plant species native to the Philippines. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa wrightii include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. Callicarpa wrightii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use.
